retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operation is part of initialization and always succeeds; retry not applicable.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is session allocation and initialization (struct allocation, string copy, mutex/list/bitmap/percpu setup). The refcount_set(1) is just one of many initialization steps, not the core function.
